national_schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana
national_schemes.description: Atal Pension Yojana is a government-backed pension scheme focused on the unorganized sector to provide financial security in old age. It replaces the previous Swavalamban Yojana. The scheme ensures that subscribers receive a guaranteed minimum monthly pension ranging from Rs. 1,000 to Rs. 5,000 upon attaining the age of 60. The pension amount depends on the contribution amount and the age at which the individual joins the scheme. In the event of the subscriber's death, the spouse is entitled to receive the same pension amount, and subsequently, the accumulated corpus is returned to the nominee.
national_schemes.objective: To provide universal social security to all citizens of India, especially those in the unorganized sector, ensuring a minimum pension post-retirement.

other_conditions: Must have a savings bank account
Must not be an income-tax payer

benefits: Guaranteed minimum monthly pension of Rs. 1000 to 5000
Return of corpus to nominee after death of subscriber and spouse
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Monthly pension of Rs. 1,000, 2,000, 3,000, 4,000, or 5,000 based on contribution.
application_process: Visit the bank branch where you have a savings account
Fill out the APY registration form
Ensure sufficient balance for auto-debit of contributions

national_schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
national_schemes.description: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY is the world's largest government-funded healthcare program. It provides cashless secondary and tertiary care hospitalization coverage of Rs. 5 lakh per family per year. The scheme is designed to cover the poor and vulnerable population based on the Socio-Economic Caste Census (SECC) data. It covers approximately 1,929 medical procedures including surgery, medical day care treatments, and cost of medicines and diagnostics. There is no restriction on family size or age of the members, and coverage starts from the first day for all pre-existing diseases. It is a portable scheme, allowing beneficiaries to avail services in any empanelled hospital across India.
national_schemes.objective: To provide health insurance coverage to low-income families and reduce out-of-pocket expenditure on healthcare.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

other_conditions: Must be listed in SECC 2011 database

benefits: Cashless hospitalization up to Rs. 5 lakh
Coverage for pre and post-hospitalization expenses
Access to public and private empanelled hospitals
application_process: Check eligibility on the official website
Visit an empanelled hospital or Common Service Centre (CSC)
Complete e-KYC to receive the Ayushman card

national_schemes.name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme
national_schemes.description: The Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA) guarantees at least 100 days of wage employment in a financial year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work. It is a demand-driven program where employment must be provided within 15 days of application. If the state fails to provide work within the stipulated time, the applicant is entitled to an unemployment allowance. The scheme focuses on creating durable assets like water conservation structures, drought proofing, and irrigation canals, contributing to the development of the rural economy and reducing poverty.
national_schemes.objective: To enhance livelihood security in rural areas by providing at least 100 days of guaranteed wage employment.
target_beneficiaries: Adults willing to do manual work

other_conditions: Must be a resident of a rural area

benefits: Unemployment allowance if work not provided
Equal wages for men and women
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Minimum daily wage as notified by the state government
application_process: Apply for a Job Card at the Gram Panchayat
Submit a written request for work to the Gram Panchayat

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana is a National Mission for Financial Inclusion to ensure access to financial services, namely, banking/savings and deposit accounts, remittance, credit, insurance, and pension in an affordable manner. It focuses on bringing the excluded sections, such as weaker sections and low-income groups, into the formal banking system. Accounts can be opened in any bank branch or Business Correspondent outlet with zero balance. The scheme also includes a RuPay debit card with an embedded accident insurance cover and an overdraft facility for eligible account holders after six months of satisfactory operation.
national_schemes.objective: To provide universal banking services to every household and promote financial literacy.

other_conditions: Must not have an existing bank account

benefits: Accidental insurance cover of Rs. 1 lakh
application_process: Visit any bank branch or bank mitra
Fill out the account opening form

national_schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card
national_schemes.description: The Kisan Credit Card (KCC) scheme provides farmers with timely access to credit for their agricultural operations and allied activities. It covers short-term credit requirements for cultivation, post-harvest expenses, and working capital for farm maintenance. The scheme offers subsidized interest rates to farmers who make timely repayments. Banks provide the credit limit based on the landholding and cropping pattern of the farmer. The KCC system has been digitized and is now integrated with the PM-KISAN scheme, allowing for easier processing and delivery of credit through ATMs, point-of-sale machines, and mobile banking.
national_schemes.objective: To provide adequate and timely credit support from the banking system to farmers for agricultural activities.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: Insurance coverage against death and permanent disability
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Credit limit based on land holding
application_process: Submit the completed KCC application form

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana-Gramin (PMAY-G) aims to provide 'Housing for All' by providing financial assistance to homeless households and those living in dilapidated houses in rural areas. The assistance is provided to construct a 'pucca' house with basic amenities including a kitchen, toilet, and electricity. The selection of beneficiaries is based on housing deprivation parameters of the Socio-Economic and Caste Census (SECC) 2011. The program emphasizes community participation and transparent monitoring through technology.
national_schemes.objective: To provide a pucca house with basic amenities to all houseless families and families living in kutcha or dilapidated houses in rural India.
benefits: Financial assistance for construction of a house
Access to electricity and clean cooking fuel
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Rs. 1.20 lakh in plain areas and Rs. 1.30 lakh in hilly/difficult areas
application_process: Beneficiary selection is based on SECC 2011
Funds transferred directly to the beneficiary's bank account

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana aims to safeguard the health of women and children by providing them with clean cooking fuel (LPG). The scheme provides deposit-free LPG connections to women from BPL families. It replaces the traditional cooking fuels like firewood, coal, and cow dung which cause respiratory issues. The government provides financial support for the connection charges, including the cost of the stove and initial refill, to ensure accessibility for the poorest sections of society.
national_schemes.objective: To provide clean cooking fuel to women from poor households to reduce health hazards.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

other_conditions: Woman must be 18 years of age
No other LPG connection in the household

benefits: Financial support for stove and first refill
Improved health for women and children
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Subsidy for connection and initial refill
application_process: Submit the application at the nearest LPG distributor

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana is a government-backed accident insurance scheme. It provides an affordable insurance cover to the citizens of India. The scheme covers death or disability due to accidents. It is an annual renewable scheme, and the premium is auto-debited from the subscriber's bank account. It is designed to provide safety net to the low-income group who often lack access to insurance.
national_schemes.objective: To provide an affordable accident insurance cover to all citizens.
benefits: Rs. 2 lakh for accidental death and full disability
Rs. 1 lakh for partial permanent disability
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Insurance cover up to Rs. 2 lakh
application_process: Ensure account has sufficient balance for premium

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana is a life insurance scheme offered by the Government of India. It provides life insurance cover for death due to any reason. The scheme is renewable annually and offers a fixed sum assured. It is designed to be highly affordable, making it accessible to those who cannot afford traditional life insurance policies. The premium is automatically deducted from the subscriber's bank account every year.
national_schemes.objective: To provide life insurance coverage to the common man at an affordable premium.
benefits: Life insurance cover of Rs. 2 lakh
Coverage for death due to any reason

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana provides loans up to Rs. 10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises. These loans are classified as MUDRA loans under PMMY. The scheme has three categories: Shishu (up to Rs. 50,000), Kishore (above Rs. 50,000 and up to Rs. 5 lakh), and Tarun (above Rs. 5 lakh and up to Rs. 10 lakh). These loans are provided by commercial banks, RRBs, small finance banks, and MFIs. There is no requirement for collateral for these loans.
national_schemes.objective: To provide access to institutional credit for small businesses and budding entrepreneurs.
benefits: Three categories based on loan amount
Ease of access via formal banking system
application_process: Submit business plan and required documents

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana is the flagship skill development scheme of the Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship. The objective of this scheme is to enable a large number of Indian youth to take up industry-relevant skill training that will help them in securing a better livelihood. Individuals with prior learning experience or skills are also assessed and certified under the Recognition of Prior Learning (RPL) component of the scheme.
national_schemes.objective: To provide industry-relevant skill training to youth and improve employability.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Training cost covered by the government
application_process: Find a training center in your area

national_schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
national_schemes.description: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana is a small savings scheme for the girl child under the 'Beti Bachao, Beti Padhao' campaign. Parents or legal guardians can open an account in the name of a girl child until she attains the age of 10. The scheme offers a higher interest rate and provides income tax benefits. It is a long-term investment aimed at meeting the future education and marriage expenses of the girl child.
national_schemes.objective: To encourage parents to build a fund for the future education and marriage of their girl child.
application_process: Visit a post office or bank

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana is a crop insurance scheme that provides insurance coverage and financial support to farmers in the event of failure of any of the notified crops as a result of natural calamities, pests, and diseases. The scheme aims to stabilize the income of farmers to ensure their continuance in farming. It promotes innovative and modern agricultural practices and encourages adoption of technology to reduce risk.
national_schemes.objective: To provide comprehensive insurance coverage to farmers to protect against crop failure.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Insurance payout based on crop loss
application_process: Fill the application form at the bank or insurance portal
Insurance company processes claims based on crop loss assessment

national_schemes.name: National Social Assistance Programme
national_schemes.description: The National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP) represents a significant step towards the fulfillment of the Directive Principles of State Policy. It provides financial assistance to the elderly, widows, and persons with disabilities living in families below the poverty line (BPL). The programme includes components like the Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS), the Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (IGNWPS), and the Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (IGNDPS).
national_schemes.objective: To provide social security and financial assistance to vulnerable sections of society.
application_process: Apply through the local Gram Panchayat or District Social Welfare Office

national_schemes.name: PM SVANidhi
national_schemes.description: The Prime Minister Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi) was launched to provide affordable working capital loans to street vendors to resume their livelihoods after the COVID-19 pandemic. The scheme provides a collateral-free loan of up to Rs. 10,000 for one year, with provisions for higher loans on timely repayment. It also incentivizes digital transactions through cash-back mechanisms.
national_schemes.objective: To provide working capital loans to street vendors to support their business revival.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

other_conditions: Must have a vendor identification card

application_process: Apply through the PM SVANidhi portal

national_schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission (Grameen)
national_schemes.description: Swachh Bharat Mission (Grameen) aims to make rural India Open Defecation Free (ODF). It focuses on the construction of individual household latrines (IHHL) and community sanitary complexes to improve sanitation standards in rural areas. The scheme also emphasizes solid and liquid waste management to ensure cleanliness in villages.
national_schemes.objective: To achieve universal sanitation coverage and make rural India ODF.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Drinking Water and Sanitation

other_conditions: Must not have a household latrine

application_process: Apply at the Gram Panchayat office

national_schemes.name: National Health Mission
national_schemes.description: The National Health Mission (NHM) encompasses its two sub-missions, the National Rural Health Mission (NRHM) and the National Urban Health Mission (NUHM). Its main goal is to provide universal access to equitable, affordable, and quality healthcare services. It focuses on health system strengthening, reproductive, maternal, neonatal, child, and adolescent health, and the management of both communicable and non-communicable diseases.
national_schemes.objective: To provide accessible, affordable, and quality healthcare to all, especially in rural and urban poor areas.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Free services at public health centers
application_process: Visit government health centers or hospitals

national_schemes.name: Start-up India
national_schemes.description: Startup India is a flagship initiative of the Government of India, intended to build a strong ecosystem for nurturing innovation and startups in the country. It provides tax exemptions, funding assistance, and simplified regulatory processes for registered startups. The program aims to drive sustainable economic growth and generate large-scale employment opportunities.
national_schemes.objective: To promote entrepreneurship and innovation by providing support to startups.

other_conditions: Registered as a startup with DPIIT

application_process: Register on the Startup India portal

national_schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
national_schemes.description: The Soil Health Card scheme provides farmers with a soil health report that includes information on soil nutrients and recommendations on appropriate dosage of fertilizers. This helps farmers improve their agricultural productivity by using fertilizers judiciously. The scheme aims to make agriculture more sustainable and profitable.
national_schemes.objective: To provide information on soil health to farmers and guide them in fertilizer use.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
application_process: Register at the local agriculture department

national_schemes.name: Stand Up India
national_schemes.description: The Stand Up India scheme facilitates bank loans between Rs. 10 lakh and Rs. 1 crore to at least one Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) borrower and at least one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise. This enterprise can be in manufacturing, services, or the trading sector.
national_schemes.objective: To promote entrepreneurship among women, SCs, and STs.
benefits: Bank loans from Rs. 10 lakh to Rs. 1 crore
application_process: Apply through the Stand Up India portal

national_schemes.name: PM POSHAN Shakti Nirman
national_schemes.description: PM POSHAN Shakti Nirman (formerly known as the Mid-Day Meal scheme) aims to provide hot cooked meals to school children in government and government-aided schools. The scheme targets children from primary and upper primary levels to improve their nutritional status, encourage school attendance, and reduce dropout rates.
national_schemes.objective: To provide hot cooked meals to school children to improve nutritional health and education.

national_schemes.name: Digital India
national_schemes.description: Digital India is a flagship initiative of the Government of India to transform the country into a digitally empowered society and knowledge economy. The program focuses on digital infrastructure, digital governance, and digital literacy. It includes various projects like BharatNet, e-Hospital, Digilocker, and e-Education.
national_schemes.objective: To expand digital infrastructure and ensure government services are available electronically.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

national_schemes.name: Make in India
national_schemes.description: Make in India is an initiative to encourage companies to manufacture their products in India. It aims to transform India into a global design and manufacturing hub. The initiative focuses on 27 key sectors and provides facilitation to investors, project monitoring, and simplified business processes.
national_schemes.objective: To attract investments and boost the manufacturing sector in India.
application_process: Register on the Invest India portal

national_schemes.name: National Education Policy 2020
national_schemes.description: The National Education Policy 2020 is a comprehensive framework to transform the education system in India. It emphasizes early childhood care, foundational literacy and numeracy, flexibility in curriculum, and skill-based education. It aims to make education more inclusive, holistic, and global-standard.
national_schemes.objective: To overhaul the Indian education system and improve learning outcomes.

national_schemes.name: Skill India Mission
national_schemes.description: Skill India Mission aims to train over 40 crore people in India in different skills by 2022. It includes initiatives such as the Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY) and National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS). The mission focuses on vocational training and enhancing the employability of the Indian youth.
national_schemes.objective: To create a skilled workforce and foster entrepreneurship.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana
national_schemes.description: The Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana aims to provide quality medicines at affordable prices to the masses. The scheme is implemented through special outlets known as 'Janaushadhi Kendras' that sell generic medicines, which are equivalent in quality and efficacy to expensive branded drugs. It significantly reduces out-of-pocket expenditure on healthcare by making essential medication accessible to all income groups, particularly the poor.
national_schemes.objective: To make high-quality generic medicines accessible to everyone at affordable prices.
benefits: Medicines at 50-90% lower price than branded equivalents
required_documents: Prescription from a registered medical practitioner
application_process: Visit any Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Kendra

national_schemes.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Gram Jyoti Yojana
national_schemes.description: DDUGJY is designed to provide continuous power supply to rural India. It focuses on separating agriculture and non-agriculture feeders to facilitate judicious rostering of supply to agricultural and non-agricultural consumers in rural areas. The scheme also includes strengthening sub-transmission and distribution infrastructure in rural areas to reduce losses and improve the quality of power supply.
national_schemes.objective: To ensure electrification of all villages and provide 24x7 power to rural households.
application_process: Implemented through state discoms and power departments

national_schemes.name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
national_schemes.description: The National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS) is a program to promote apprenticeship training and increase the engagement of apprentices. It provides financial support to industries for training apprentices and helps young individuals gain practical industry experience, making them more employable. The government shares the cost of the basic training and provides a stipend support for the apprentices.
national_schemes.objective: To promote apprenticeship training and increase industrial engagement with youth.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

other_conditions: Must meet physical and educational requirements

national_schemes.financial_assistance: Basic training cost and stipend support

national_schemes.name: FAME India Scheme
national_schemes.description: The Faster Adoption and Manufacturing of (Hybrid &) Electric Vehicles in India (FAME) scheme aims to promote the adoption of electric and hybrid vehicles. It provides incentives to purchasers of electric and hybrid vehicles to reduce the purchase price and supports the creation of charging infrastructure. The scheme plays a crucial role in reducing carbon emissions and promoting green mobility in India.
national_schemes.objective: To encourage the adoption of electric vehicles and reduce reliance on fossil fuels.
application_process: Avail discount at the time of purchase from dealers

national_schemes.name: National Food Security Act
national_schemes.description: The National Food Security Act (NFSA) provides for food and nutritional security by ensuring access to an adequate quantity of quality food at affordable prices. It provides highly subsidized food grains to up to 75% of the rural population and 50% of the urban population through the Public Distribution System (PDS).
national_schemes.objective: To ensure food and nutritional security by providing subsidized food grains.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution

other_conditions: Must be listed as eligible households

benefits: Subsidized food grains (Rice, Wheat, Coarse grains)
application_process: Apply through the local PDS office
Collect rations from fair price shops

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana is a maternity benefit program. It provides a cash incentive of Rs. 5,000 to pregnant women and lactating mothers for the first living child. The aim is to partially compensate for the wage loss in terms of rest and nutrition, ensuring better health for the mother and the infant.
national_schemes.objective: To improve health of pregnant women and nursing mothers through cash incentives.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

national_schemes.name: National Rural Livelihood Mission
national_schemes.description: The National Rural Livelihood Mission (NRLM) aims to reduce poverty by enabling the poor household to access self-employment and skilled wage employment opportunities. It emphasizes social mobilization of rural poor into Self-Help Groups (SHGs) and provides them with financial support, training, and marketing opportunities to build sustainable livelihoods.
national_schemes.objective: To eliminate poverty by promoting self-employment and skill development in rural areas.

other_conditions: Must be a member of an SHG

national_schemes.financial_assistance: Revolving fund and bank credit linkage
application_process: Join an SHG at the village level

national_schemes.name: PM Vaya Vandana Yojana
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana is a pension scheme for senior citizens aged 60 and above. It provides an assured return on investments for a period of 10 years. The scheme is designed to protect elderly persons against a fall in interest rates and provide a steady monthly, quarterly, half-yearly, or annual income to senior citizens.
national_schemes.objective: To provide financial security and steady income to senior citizens.

national_schemes.name: Mission Indradhanush
national_schemes.description: Mission Indradhanush aims to ensure full immunization with all available vaccines for children up to 2 years of age and pregnant women. It targets partially or unvaccinated children and pregnant women who have been missed out in the routine immunization program. It covers diseases such as diphtheria, whooping cough, tetanus, polio, tuberculosis, measles, and hepatitis B.
national_schemes.objective: To achieve full immunization coverage for all children and pregnant women.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana aims to improve farm productivity and ensure better utilization of resources in the country. It focuses on expanding the cultivated area with assured irrigation, reducing wastage of water, and improving water use efficiency. It involves various components like 'Har Khet Ko Pani' and 'Per Drop More Crop'.
national_schemes.objective: To ensure access to irrigation for every field and improve water use efficiency.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
application_process: Apply through local agriculture or irrigation department

national_schemes.name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana
national_schemes.description: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana is a sub-component of the Soil Health Management (SHM) scheme under the National Mission of Sustainable Agriculture (NMSA). It aims to support and promote organic farming in the country. The scheme encourages farmers to adopt traditional farming methods, which are environmentally friendly and promote health.
national_schemes.objective: To promote sustainable organic farming and reduce dependence on chemical fertilizers.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Financial assistance for organic farming certification and inputs
application_process: Register through the cluster-based approach at district level

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi is an income support scheme. All landholding farmers' families in India are provided with financial support of Rs. 6,000 per annum, payable in three equal installments of Rs. 2,000 each, directly into their bank accounts. The scheme aims to augment the income of the farmers.
national_schemes.objective: To provide financial support to small and marginal farmers.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

national_schemes.name: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihood Mission
national_schemes.description: DAY-NULM aims to reduce poverty and vulnerability of urban poor households by enabling them to access gainful self-employment and skilled wage employment opportunities. It provides support for skill training, self-employment ventures, and shelter for the urban homeless.
national_schemes.objective: To uplift the urban poor through skill development and self-employment opportunities.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Skill training costs and loan subsidies
application_process: Apply through the local municipal body

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Jan Pariyojana - PMAY (Urban)
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban) aims to provide 'Housing for All' in urban areas. It provides financial assistance to eligible urban poor for construction of houses or purchase of houses through credit-linked subsidy. The scheme focuses on slum rehabilitation and affordable housing in partnership.
national_schemes.objective: To ensure affordable housing for the urban poor.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

national_schemes.name: National Scholarship Portal
national_schemes.description: The National Scholarship Portal (NSP) is a one-stop digital platform for students to apply for various scholarships offered by the Central and State governments. It ensures timely disbursement of scholarships directly to the bank accounts of students, promoting transparency and accessibility.
national_schemes.objective: To provide a centralized platform for scholarship applications and disbursement.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

national_schemes.name: National Career Service
national_schemes.description: The National Career Service (NCS) project aims to provide a variety of career-related services such as job matching, career counseling, vocational guidance, and information on skill development courses. It bridges the gap between job seekers and employers, promoting employment opportunities.
national_schemes.objective: To provide career services and bridge the gap between job seekers and employers.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Jan Aushadhi Kendra Scheme (Expansion)
national_schemes.description: This expansion phase aims to open more Janaushadhi Kendras across all districts in India to ensure easier access to affordable generic medicines for every citizen.
national_schemes.objective: To increase accessibility of generic medicines through widespread retail outlets.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Sahaj Bijli Har Ghar Yojana
national_schemes.description: The Saubhagya scheme aims to achieve universal household electrification in India. It provides electricity connections to all remaining un-electrified households in rural and urban areas. The government provides free electricity connections to poor households.
national_schemes.objective: To ensure last-mile connectivity and electricity for all households.
application_process: Apply through electricity department or local camp

national_schemes.name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana
national_schemes.description: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana aims to achieve 4% annual growth in agriculture by ensuring holistic development of agriculture and allied sectors. It provides autonomy to states to plan and execute schemes based on local needs, ensuring that agricultural growth is inclusive and sustainable.
national_schemes.objective: To encourage holistic development of agriculture and allied sectors.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana - Per Drop More Crop
national_schemes.description: Per Drop More Crop is a component of PMKSY that focuses on enhancing water use efficiency through drip and sprinkler irrigation, promoting precision farming, and optimizing the use of water resources.
national_schemes.objective: To improve water use efficiency at the farm level.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
application_process: Apply through the local agricultural department

national_schemes.name: National Mission for Sustainable Agriculture
national_schemes.description: NMSA aims to make agriculture more productive, sustainable, and climate-resilient. It promotes location-specific integrated farming systems, soil health management, and efficient water management practices to ensure long-term sustainability.
national_schemes.objective: To promote sustainable agricultural practices and climate-resilient farming.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bharatiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana - Digital Inventory
national_schemes.description: This initiative digitizes the inventory management system for Janaushadhi Kendras, ensuring better supply chain management, real-time stock monitoring, and reduced medicine shortages.
national_schemes.objective: To improve efficiency and transparency in medicine distribution.

national_schemes.name: National Digital Health Mission
national_schemes.description: The National Digital Health Mission aims to create a digital health ecosystem for India. It provides a unique health ID for every citizen, enabling seamless access to health records, digital consultations, and health services.
national_schemes.objective: To provide a digital framework for healthcare delivery.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mega Integrated Textile Region and Apparel
national_schemes.description: PM MITRA parks are designed to create world-class infrastructure for the textile sector. The parks aim to attract large-scale investments and boost employment in the textile industry by creating an integrated ecosystem for spinning, weaving, processing, and garment manufacturing.
national_schemes.objective: To create an integrated textile ecosystem and boost exports and employment.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Sampada Yojana
national_schemes.description: PMKSY (Food) aims to provide a big boost to the growth of the food processing sector in India. It helps in the creation of modern infrastructure, such as mega food parks and cold chain facilities, to reduce food wastage and increase farmers' income.
national_schemes.objective: To modernize the food processing sector and reduce wastage.

national_schemes.name: PM Gati Shakti National Master Plan
national_schemes.description: A digital platform to bring 16 Ministries including Railways and Roadways together for integrated planning and coordinated implementation of infrastructure connectivity projects. It aims to reduce logistics costs and increase cargo handling capacity.
national_schemes.objective: To provide integrated infrastructure connectivity for seamless movement of goods and people.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana
national_schemes.description: The flagship scheme of the Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship. It aims to mobilize youth to take up skill training with the aim of increasing productivity and aligning training with industry requirements.
national_schemes.objective: To provide industry-relevant skill training to youth.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

national_schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana
national_schemes.description: A government-backed pension scheme aimed primarily at the unorganized sector. It provides a defined monthly pension of Rs. 1,000 to Rs. 5,000 to subscribers at the age of 60, depending on the contribution amount.
national_schemes.objective: To provide old-age income security to unorganized sector workers.
benefits: Pension to spouse after subscriber's death
application_process: Apply through bank or post office

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
national_schemes.description: A government-backed accident insurance scheme. It offers a one-year renewable accidental death-cum-disability cover of Rs. 2 lakh for death or full disability and Rs. 1 lakh for partial permanent disability.
national_schemes.objective: To provide affordable accidental insurance cover.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
national_schemes.description: A life insurance scheme offering a renewable one-year life cover of Rs. 2 lakh for death due to any reason, available to people between 18 and 50 years of age.
national_schemes.objective: To provide life insurance coverage to the common man.

national_schemes.name: Digital India Land Records Modernization Programme
national_schemes.description: Aiming to modernize land management, reduce land disputes, and enhance transparency in the land record maintenance system by digitizing all land records.
national_schemes.objective: To achieve a transparent land records management system.

national_schemes.name: SVANidhi Scheme
national_schemes.description: Micro-credit facility to provide affordable working capital loans to street vendors who have been adversely affected by COVID-19.
national_schemes.objective: To provide working capital loans to street vendors.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

national_schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
national_schemes.description: A campaign to address the declining Child Sex Ratio (CSR) and related issues of women empowerment. It focuses on awareness, advocacy, and education for the girl child.
national_schemes.objective: To prevent gender-biased sex-selective elimination and ensure survival and education of the girl child.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

other_conditions: Focus on low child sex ratio districts

national_schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission (Grameen)
national_schemes.description: Aims to make rural India Open Defecation Free (ODF) through the construction of toilets and awareness campaigns regarding sanitation and hygiene.
national_schemes.objective: To achieve universal sanitation coverage in rural areas.

national_schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card Scheme
national_schemes.description: Provides farmers with timely access to credit for their cultivation and other agricultural needs at subsidized interest rates.
national_schemes.objective: To provide adequate and timely credit support to farmers.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Credit limit based on crop area
application_process: Apply at commercial or cooperative banks

national_schemes.name: Make in India
national_schemes.description: An initiative to encourage companies to manufacture their products in India and increase the manufacturing sector's contribution to the GDP.
national_schemes.objective: To transform India into a global design and manufacturing hub.

national_schemes.name: Start-up India
national_schemes.description: A flagship initiative to build a strong ecosystem that is conducive for the growth of startup businesses, to drive sustainable economic growth and generate large-scale employment opportunities.
national_schemes.objective: To promote innovation and entrepreneurship.

national_schemes.name: Stand-Up India
national_schemes.description: Facilitates bank loans between Rs. 10 lakh and Rs. 1 crore to at least one Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) borrower and at least one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
national_schemes.objective: To promote entrepreneurship at the grassroots level.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
national_schemes.description: Provides clean cooking fuel (LPG) to rural and poor households, replacing traditional cooking fuels like firewood or cow dung to improve women's health.
national_schemes.objective: To provide LPG connections to women from BPL households.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

national_schemes.name: Smart Cities Mission
national_schemes.description: An urban renewal program to develop 100 cities across the country, making them citizen-friendly and sustainable through technology and infrastructure improvement.
national_schemes.objective: To provide core infrastructure and a decent quality of life to citizens.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana
national_schemes.description: Aims to provide good all-weather road connectivity to unconnected habitations in rural areas.
national_schemes.objective: To connect rural areas with all-weather roads.

national_schemes.name: Digital India
national_schemes.description: A campaign to ensure that government services are made available to citizens electronically by improved online infrastructure and by increasing internet connectivity.
national_schemes.objective: To transform India into a digitally empowered society.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

national_schemes.name: AMRUT Mission
national_schemes.description: Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation. Focuses on ensuring that every household has access to a tap with assured supply of water and a sewerage connection.
national_schemes.objective: To provide basic services like water supply and sewerage to households.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Kendras
national_schemes.description: Establishment of model training centers in every district to provide state-of-the-art skill development training.
national_schemes.objective: To create industry-led, high-quality training centers.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

national_schemes.name: National Ayush Mission
national_schemes.description: Supports the efforts of State/UT Governments for providing AYUSH health services/education, strengthening infrastructure, and promoting medicinal plant cultivation.
national_schemes.objective: To provide cost-effective AYUSH services.

national_schemes.name: Deendayal Upadhyaya Gramin Kaushalya Yojana
national_schemes.description: Skill training initiative for rural youth, aimed at diversifying incomes of poor rural families and catering to the career aspirations of rural youth.
national_schemes.objective: To transform rural youth into a productive workforce.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
national_schemes.description: A National Mission for Financial Inclusion to ensure access to financial services, namely: basic savings & deposit accounts, remittance, credit, insurance, pension in an affordable manner.
national_schemes.objective: To ensure access to financial services for all.

national_schemes.name: Gram Swaraj Abhiyan
national_schemes.description: A mission to promote social harmony and reach out to poor households to ensure their coverage under welfare schemes.
national_schemes.objective: To spread awareness about pro-poor initiatives of the government.

national_schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
national_schemes.description: Assists state governments to issue soil health cards to all farmers. The card provides information about the nutrient status of the soil along with recommendations on appropriate dosage of nutrients.
national_schemes.objective: To improve soil fertility and crop productivity.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

national_schemes.name: Van Dhan Yojana
national_schemes.description: A program for value addition to Minor Forest Produce (MFP). It focuses on tribal-led value addition, processing, and marketing to generate income for tribal communities.
national_schemes.objective: To provide tribal communities with better returns for their forest produce.

other_conditions: Member of Van Dhan Vikas Kendra

national_schemes.name: PM SHRI Schools
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Schools for Rising India (PM SHRI) is a centrally sponsored scheme to upgrade over 14,500 government schools. These schools are designed to become model schools, showcasing the implementation of the National Education Policy 2020 by providing high-quality teaching, modern infrastructure, and a holistic environment.
national_schemes.objective: To create model schools that act as a benchmark for quality education in India.

other_conditions: Enrolled in selected PM SHRI Schools

national_schemes.financial_assistance: Direct funding for school infrastructure and activities
application_process: Automatic via school selection by government

national_schemes.name: PM POSHAN Shakti Nirman
national_schemes.description: Formerly known as the Mid-Day Meal Scheme, this initiative provides one hot cooked meal to students in government and government-aided schools. It aims to improve nutritional status, promote school attendance, and address classroom hunger.
national_schemes.objective: To provide nutritious cooked meals to school children.

other_conditions: Must be enrolled in government/aided schools

national_schemes.financial_assistance: Provision of food grains and cooking cost

national_schemes.name: SAMPADA Scheme
national_schemes.description: Scheme for Agro-Marine Processing and Development of Agro-Processing Clusters. It provides a comprehensive package to give a renewed thrust to the food processing sector, aiming to link production, processing, and consumption.
national_schemes.objective: To modernize food processing and reduce wastage.
application_process: Apply through the MoFPI online portal

national_schemes.name: PM-DAKSH
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Dakshta Aur Kushalta Sampann Hitgrahi Yojana aims to increase the skill levels of target groups like SCs, OBCs, and sanitation workers, enabling them to earn better livelihoods.
national_schemes.objective: To enhance skill levels and employability of marginalized groups.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

national_schemes.name: Nari Shakti Puraskar
national_schemes.description: An annual award given by the Ministry of Women and Child Development to individuals, groups, or institutions who have rendered distinguished services for the cause of women empowerment.
national_schemes.objective: To recognize and reward efforts towards women empowerment.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

national_schemes.name: PM e-VIDYA
national_schemes.description: An initiative to unify all efforts related to digital/online/on-air education to provide multi-mode access to education for students across the country.
national_schemes.objective: To ensure equitable access to digital education.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
national_schemes.description: A crop insurance scheme that provides insurance coverage and financial support to farmers in the event of failure of any of the notified crops as a result of natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
national_schemes.objective: To reduce the financial burden of farmers during crop failure.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

national_schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission
national_schemes.description: Creates a seamless online platform through the provision of a wide range of data, information, and infrastructure services, duly leveraging open, interoperable, standards-based digital systems.
national_schemes.objective: To digitize health records and connect health providers.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

national_schemes.name: PM SVANidhi
national_schemes.description: Micro-credit scheme providing working capital loans to street vendors to help them resume their businesses post-pandemic.
national_schemes.objective: To facilitate financial independence for street vendors.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

national_schemes.name: National Technical Textiles Mission
national_schemes.description: A mission to position India as a global leader in technical textiles by promoting research, innovation, and development in the textile sector.
national_schemes.objective: To promote innovation in technical textiles.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana
national_schemes.description: Focused on sustainable and responsible development of the fisheries sector in India. It aims to enhance fish production and productivity.
national_schemes.objective: To revolutionize the fisheries sector.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying

national_schemes.name: National Infrastructure Pipeline
national_schemes.description: An investment plan for the social and economic infrastructure projects in India. It is a cluster of multi-sectoral projects to improve the quality of life.
national_schemes.objective: To provide high-quality infrastructure across the country.

national_schemes.name: UDAN Scheme
national_schemes.description: Ude Desh ka Aam Nagrik aims to make flying affordable and accessible by connecting underserved and unserved airports in India.
national_schemes.objective: To promote regional air connectivity.

national_schemes.name: National Solar Mission
national_schemes.description: Aims to establish India as a global leader in solar energy by creating policy conditions for its diffusion across the country as quickly as possible.
national_schemes.objective: To promote sustainable growth using solar energy.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
application_process: Apply via National Portal for Rooftop Solar

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana - Suvidha
national_schemes.description: A part of the PMBJP, this initiative provides affordable, biodegradable sanitary pads to women in rural areas.
national_schemes.objective: To promote menstrual hygiene among rural women.
application_process: Purchase from any Jan Aushadhi Kendra

national_schemes.name: National Monetization Pipeline
national_schemes.description: An asset monetization plan to unlock the value of infrastructure assets across core infrastructure sectors like roads, railways, and power.
national_schemes.objective: To mobilize private capital for infrastructure development.

national_schemes.name: KUSUM Scheme
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan aims to provide energy security to farmers by installing solar pumps and grid-connected solar power plants.
national_schemes.objective: To de-dieselize the agriculture sector.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
application_process: Apply through state renewable energy agency

national_schemes.name: National Hydrogen Mission
national_schemes.description: Aims to make India a global hub for the production and export of Green Hydrogen.
national_schemes.objective: To decarbonize the industry and energy sectors.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

national_schemes.name: PM e-Bus Sewa
national_schemes.description: Augmenting city bus operations by deploying 10,000 electric buses in 169 cities under a public-private partnership (PPP) model.
national_schemes.objective: To promote green urban transport.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

national_schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
national_schemes.description: Supports traditional artisans and craftspeople by providing skill training, toolkit incentives, and credit support to integrate them into domestic and global value chains.
national_schemes.objective: To empower traditional craftspeople.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

national_schemes.name: National Logistics Policy
national_schemes.description: Provides a comprehensive interdisciplinary, cross-sectoral, and multi-jurisdictional framework for the development of the entire logistics ecosystem in India.
national_schemes.objective: To reduce logistics cost and improve supply chain efficiency.

national_schemes.name: Deep Ocean Mission
national_schemes.description: Explores the deep ocean for resources and develops deep-sea technologies for sustainable use of ocean resources.
national_schemes.objective: To explore deep-sea resources and ocean climate change.

national_schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission 2.0
national_schemes.description: Focuses on making all cities 'Garbage Free' and ensuring grey and black water management in all cities.
national_schemes.objective: To achieve a garbage-free urban environment.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin
national_schemes.description: Provides financial assistance to rural households for the construction of pucca houses with basic amenities.
national_schemes.objective: To provide housing for all in rural areas.

national_schemes.name: Jal Jeevan Mission
national_schemes.description: Ensures every rural household in India has access to safe and adequate drinking water through individual household tap connections.
national_schemes.objective: To provide tap water to every rural household.

national_schemes.name: PM-Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana
national_schemes.description: A scheme to provide free electricity to households by incentivizing the installation of rooftop solar panels, aiming to help up to 1 crore households.
national_schemes.objective: To promote renewable energy and reduce electricity bills for households.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

national_schemes.name: Lakhpati Didi Yojana
national_schemes.description: An initiative to empower women in Self-Help Groups (SHGs) to earn an annual income of at least one lakh rupees through skill development and economic activities.
national_schemes.objective: To empower rural women to achieve financial independence.

other_conditions: Member of Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - NRLM

national_schemes.name: PM Matsya Kisan Samridhi Sah-Yojana
national_schemes.description: A sub-scheme under the PMMSY focusing on boosting the fisheries sector through investment in digital infrastructure and support for micro-enterprises.
national_schemes.objective: To improve efficiency and reach of fish farmers.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying

other_conditions: Micro-enterprise or individual engaged in fish value chain

application_process: Apply through the fisheries department portal

national_schemes.name: Viksit Bharat Sankalp Yatra
national_schemes.description: A massive nationwide outreach campaign to reach out to the unreached and ensure the benefits of various welfare schemes reach all citizens.
national_schemes.objective: To achieve saturation of government schemes.

national_schemes.name: PM-JANMAN
national_schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Janjati Adivasi Nyaya Maha Abhiyan is focused on the holistic development of Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Groups (PVTGs).
national_schemes.objective: To provide basic facilities to tribal groups.

national_schemes.name: PM-eBus Sewa (Payment Security Mechanism)
national_schemes.description: A payment security mechanism for the procurement of electric buses under the PM e-Bus Sewa scheme to ensure smooth operations.
national_schemes.objective: To facilitate the transition to electric urban transport.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

national_schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Advanced Chemistry Cell
national_schemes.description: A scheme to boost domestic manufacturing of Advanced Chemistry Cell (ACC) batteries for use in electric vehicles and energy storage.
national_schemes.objective: To reduce dependence on imports for battery technology.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana 4.0
national_schemes.description: The fourth phase of the skill development program focusing on new-age skills like Industry 4.0, coding, AI, and robotics to improve youth employability.
national_schemes.objective: To equip youth with future-ready skills.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

national_schemes.name: National Digital Health Ecosystem (Ayushman Bharat)
national_schemes.description: An integrated digital health infrastructure to enable a unified health ecosystem, including electronic health records and telemedicine.
national_schemes.objective: To create a seamless and interoperable health network.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

national_schemes.name: Amrit Bharat Station Scheme
national_schemes.description: Aims to modernize and redevelop over 1,300 railway stations across the country with world-class facilities and integrated city connectivity.
national_schemes.objective: To improve passenger experience at railway stations.

national_schemes.name: PM-DevINE
national_schemes.description: Prime Minister's Development Initiative for North East Region; provides funding for infrastructure and development projects in the Northeast states.
national_schemes.objective: To foster development in the Northeast region.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region

national_schemes.name: Mission Karmayogi
national_schemes.description: A national program for civil services capacity building to make the Indian bureaucracy more creative, constructive, and imaginative.
national_schemes.objective: To transform government employees into civil 'Karmayogis'.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions

national_schemes.name: PM SHRI Schools (Phase 2)
national_schemes.description: An extension of the PM SHRI scheme to cover more government schools to bring them to high-quality standards based on NEP 2020 principles.
national_schemes.objective: To upgrade more schools to the PM SHRI model.

national_schemes.name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme
national_schemes.description: Provides financial assistance to startups for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, market entry, and commercialization.
national_schemes.objective: To provide early-stage capital for startups.
application_process: Apply through the Startup India portal

national_schemes.name: PM Formalisation of Micro Food Processing Enterprises
national_schemes.description: Supports existing unorganized micro food processing enterprises with credit-linked subsidies and training.
national_schemes.objective: To formalize and scale micro food enterprises.

national_schemes.name: National Single Window System
national_schemes.description: A one-stop digital platform for investors to get approvals and clearances from various central and state ministries.
national_schemes.objective: To improve ease of doing business in India.

national_schemes.name: PM Gati Shakti
national_schemes.description: A national master plan for multi-modal connectivity to reduce logistics costs and provide integrated planning for infrastructure projects.
national_schemes.objective: To create a seamless infrastructure network.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Jan Aushadhi Pariyojana - Kendra Expansion
national_schemes.description: A campaign to provide quality generic medicines at affordable prices to all, particularly the poor.
national_schemes.objective: To make quality healthcare affordable.
benefits: Generic medicines at very low cost

national_schemes.name: National Beekeeping and Honey Mission
national_schemes.description: Promotes scientific beekeeping for honey production and overall development of the beekeeping sector.
national_schemes.objective: To achieve the 'Sweet Revolution'.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ayushman Bharat Health Infrastructure Mission
national_schemes.description: Strengthens health infrastructure from primary to critical care levels across India, ensuring preparedness for future health emergencies.
national_schemes.objective: To build a robust public health system.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

national_schemes.name: PM Poshan 2.0 (Extension)
national_schemes.description: The updated phase of the Mid-Day Meal scheme, focusing on nutrition, including kitchen gardens and localized food choices in schools.
national_schemes.objective: To tackle childhood malnutrition.

national_schemes.name: PM-Vikas (Pradhan Mantri Virasat Ka Samvardhan)
national_schemes.description: An integrated skill development scheme for minority communities, focusing on preserving heritage, improving livelihoods, and empowerment.
national_schemes.objective: To empower minorities through skill-based training.

national_schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission (Grameen) Phase II
national_schemes.description: Focuses on maintaining the ODF (Open Defecation Free) status and moving towards 'ODF Plus' by managing solid and liquid waste in villages.
national_schemes.objective: To ensure rural sanitation and hygiene.

national_schemes.name: National Mission for Clean Ganga (Namami Gange)
national_schemes.description: An integrated conservation mission to accomplish the twin objectives of effective abatement of pollution and conservation of the River Ganga.
national_schemes.objective: To rejuvenate the River Ganga.

national_schemes.name: PM Mega Integrated Textile Region and Apparel (PM MITRA)
national_schemes.description: A scheme to establish seven mega textile parks to create a world-class infrastructure for the textile industry, aiming to attract huge investment.
national_schemes.objective: To boost textile manufacturing and exports.

national_schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma
national_schemes.description: A holistic scheme to support traditional artisans and craftspeople through training, toolkits, and credit support.
national_schemes.objective: To integrate artisans into the formal economy and value chains.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
national_schemes.financial_assistance: Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) and subsidized loans

national_schemes.name: PM-USP (Pradhan Mantri Jan Vikas Karyakram)
national_schemes.description: Focuses on infrastructure development in minority-concentrated areas to improve socio-economic conditions.
national_schemes.objective: To reduce development gaps in minority communities.

national_schemes.name: NIPUN Bharat Mission
national_schemes.description: National Initiative for Proficiency in Reading with Understanding and Numeracy; aims to ensure foundational literacy and numeracy for all children by grade 3.
national_schemes.objective: To achieve universal foundational literacy.

national_schemes.name: SAMPADA (Pradhan Mantri Kisan SAMPADA Yojana)
national_schemes.description: Integrated scheme for the development of modern infrastructure for food processing from farm gate to retail outlet.
national_schemes.objective: To reduce food wastage and increase farmers' income.

national_schemes.name: PM-KUSUM (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan)
national_schemes.description: Scheme for solarization of agricultural pumps and installation of grid-connected solar power plants on barren land.
national_schemes.objective: To provide energy security to farmers and promote solar energy.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
application_process: Apply through state renewable energy departments

national_schemes.name: SVANidhi (PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi)
national_schemes.description: Provides affordable working capital loan to street vendors to resume their livelihood after the pandemic.
national_schemes.objective: To empower street vendors with credit.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

national_schemes.name: Mission Amrit Sarovar
national_schemes.description: Focuses on water conservation by developing and rejuvenating 75 water bodies in each district of India.
national_schemes.objective: To ensure water security through rainwater harvesting.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
national_schemes.description: Maternity benefit programme that provides cash incentives to pregnant and lactating mothers for the first living child.
national_schemes.objective: To support improved nutrition and health for mother and child.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
application_process: Apply through Anganwadi center or online portal

national_schemes.name: Aatmanirbhar Bharat Rozgar Yojana
national_schemes.description: Incentivizes employers to create new jobs during the post-COVID-19 economic recovery phase by subsidizing EPF contributions.
national_schemes.objective: To boost employment creation.

national_schemes.name: PM-DAKSH (Pradhan Mantri Dakshta Aur Kushalta Sampann Hitgrahi)
national_schemes.description: Skill development program for marginalized groups (SC, OBC, Safai Karamcharis) to enhance employability.
national_schemes.objective: To provide skill training for better livelihood opportunities.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

national_schemes.name: Seva Bhoj Yojna
national_schemes.description: Provides financial assistance for Central Goods and Services Tax (CGST) and Central Government share of IGST on food items donated by religious/charitable institutions.
national_schemes.objective: To reduce the financial burden of institutions that provide free food.

other_conditions: Serving free food to large numbers of people

application_process: Submit application to the Ministry of Culture

national_schemes.name: Khelo India Scheme
national_schemes.description: National program for development of sports, aiming to revive the sports culture at the grassroots level.
national_schemes.objective: To identify talent and provide sports infrastructure.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
national_schemes.description: A crop insurance scheme that provides financial support to farmers suffering crop loss/damage arising out of natural calamities.
national_schemes.objective: To stabilize the income of farmers.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

national_schemes.name: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission
national_schemes.description: Focuses on reducing poverty and vulnerability of urban poor households by providing them with self-employment and wage-employment opportunities.
national_schemes.objective: To improve livelihood for the urban poor.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

national_schemes.name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
national_schemes.description: Promotes apprenticeship training by providing financial support to establishments engaged in apprenticeship training.
national_schemes.objective: To increase the number of apprentices in the workforce.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Jan Pariyojana (PMAY-G)
national_schemes.description: Provides financial assistance to eligible rural families for construction of pucca houses.
national_schemes.objective: To provide 'Housing for All'.

national_schemes.name: UDAN (Ude Desh ka Aam Nagrik)
national_schemes.description: Regional Connectivity Scheme to develop small airports and make air travel affordable for the common citizen.
national_schemes.objective: To increase regional air connectivity.

national_schemes.name: Digital India Land Records Modernization Programme
national_schemes.description: Aims to modernize management of land records, minimize scope of land/property disputes, and enhance transparency.
national_schemes.objective: To digitize land records.

national_schemes.name: PM-VAYVANDANA (Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana)
national_schemes.description: A pension scheme for senior citizens (60+) that provides a guaranteed return on the invested amount.
national_schemes.objective: To provide old-age financial security.

national_schemes.name: National Career Service
national_schemes.description: A mission-mode project to provide a variety of employment-related services like job matching, career counseling, and vocational guidance.
national_schemes.objective: To bridge the gap between job seekers and employers.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Jan Urja Suraksha (Kisan Samman Nidhi - PM-KISAN)
national_schemes.description: Provides income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to all landholding farmer families.
national_schemes.objective: To supplement the financial needs of farmers.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
application_process: Apply online or via Common Service Center

national_schemes.name: Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation
national_schemes.description: Focuses on establishing infrastructure to ensure that every household has access to a tap with assured supply of water and a sewerage connection.
national_schemes.objective: To improve urban infrastructure.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

national_schemes.name: SAMPADA (Pradhan Mantri Kisan SAMPADA Yojana) - Cold Chain
national_schemes.description: A specific component of PMKSY to create cold chain, preservation, and transportation facilities for perishable produce.
national_schemes.objective: To prevent post-harvest losses.

national_schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
national_schemes.description: Aims to prevent gender-biased sex-selective elimination, ensure survival and protection of the girl child, and ensure education and participation.
national_schemes.objective: To empower the girl child.
national_schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Jan Aushadhi Pariyojana
national_schemes.description: Ensuring availability of quality medicines at affordable prices for all through dedicated Jan Aushadhi stores.
national_schemes.objective: To make healthcare affordable.
